title: space_join: invite code field has no length cap before DB lookup
description: In daemon/src/jmap.rs space_join (line 1528-1531), the 'code' field is extracted from args as an arbitrary-length string and passed directly to store.use_space_invite_code(). The store function passes it as a bind parameter to a SELECT query, so SQL injection is not a risk, but there is no upper-bound on allocation before the DB round-trip. A hostile client can submit a multi-megabyte code string. Fix: reject codes longer than, e.g., 64 bytes (the current generated codes are 8 chars) with invalidArguments before touching the store.
